heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1140o Authorization of appropriations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 775 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1132h–4 of this titlePub. L. 102–325

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subpart such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009 and each of the five succeeding fiscal years.

children.heading: Priority
children.label: b Priority
children.text: For the first fiscal year for which funds are made available under this section, the Secretary shall give priority to allocating funding for the purposes of section 1140 of this title.l
